title: Track Prehack: AAG x ASG
description: An exclusive prehack session featuring industry partners, offering participants valuable insights into business innovation, entrepreneurship, and real-world challenges to prepare for the hackathon journey.

title: Hilti Industry Visit
description: Experience the professional working environment firsthand through an industry visit that provides career insights, networking opportunities, and exposure to real-world business operations.

title: AOT x Skilio
description: Gain practical career and professional development insights from industry experts, learning how to communicate effectively, build your personal brand, and accelerate your career growth.

title: AOT x Petronas
description: A sustainability initiative encouraging responsible waste management by collecting used cooking oil for recycling, helping reduce environmental impact and promote a greener future.

title: AOT x XRJam
description: Explore the future of immersive technology through hands-on learning in XR development, AI integration, and game engine technologies such as Unity and Unreal Engine.
